motivo: código extraído mas apenas 5/6 seções presentes
resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def rangeBitwiseAnd(self, left: int, right: int) -> int:
        shift = 0
        while left < right:
            left >>= 1
            right >>= 1
            shift += 1
        return left << shift
```

efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(max(left, right)))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
